summary: Completed testing of Store Profile Page feature with follow system. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/store/{slug} returns store profile with all fields (hero, logo, story, location, contact)
Backend: GET /api/store/{slug} returns 404 for non-existent store
Backend: GET /api/store/{slug}/products returns products list with total count
Backend: GET /api/store/{slug}/reviews returns reviews with average rating
Backend: GET /api/store/{slug}/certificates returns certificates list
Backend: POST /api/store/{slug}/follow requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/store/{slug}/following requires authentication (401)
Backend: Follow/unfollow flow works correctly with status updates
Backend: Following non-existent store returns 404
Backend: GET /api/producer/store-profile requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/producer/store-profile returns producer's store with editable fields
Backend: PUT /api/producer/store-profile updates and persists changes
Frontend: Store page loads at /store/artisan-foods-co with hero section
Frontend: Store page shows store name 'Artisan Foods Co' with verified badge
Frontend: Store page shows 'Nuestra Historia' (Our Story) section
Frontend: Store page shows tabs (Productos, Certificados, Reseñas) with counts
Frontend: Store page shows Contact section with email, phone, WhatsApp
Frontend: Store page shows Social media links (Instagram, Facebook)
Frontend: Follow button shows 'Seguir tienda' when not logged in
Frontend: Follow button click shows toast 'Inicia sesión para seguir tiendas' when not logged in
Frontend: Follow button changes to 'Siguiendo' after following (logged in)
Frontend: Follow success toast shows notification message
Frontend: ProductCard shows producer name as clickable link to /store/{slug}
Frontend: Producer dashboard has 'Mi Tienda' menu item in sidebar
Frontend: Producer store profile page shows editable fields (hero, logo, location, contact)
Frontend: Producer store profile page has 'Guardar cambios' (Save) button
Frontend: Producer store profile page has 'Ver tienda' (View store) button
critical_code_review_comments: Store profile page correctly uses data-testid='follow-store-btn' for testing
ProductCard correctly links to /store/{producer_slug} with data-testid='store-link'
Producer layout includes 'Mi Tienda' menu item with Store icon
Follow system properly handles authentication and shows appropriate messages
seed_data_creation: Used existing test store 'Artisan Foods Co' with slug 'artisan-foods-co' (store_id: store_9d94930724f2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Store Profile Page feature fully implemented and tested. Store at /store/artisan-foods-co has complete profile with hero image, logo, story, gallery, location, contact info, and social links. Follow system works with email+in-app notifications. Producer can edit store profile at /producer/store. ProductCard links to store page via producer_slug.
